page.text: Pathfinder is one of the most popular and comprehensive
tabletop roleplaying games on the planet. Taking place in
the fantastic world of Golarion during an era of uncertain
prophecy known as the Age of Lost Omens, Pathfinder
gives players the chance to play heroes in a vast landscape
Pathfinder is a full-service RPG, providing players and GMs exciting and ever-evolving
options to customize their characters and adventures. The following are some of
Pathfinder’s most popular product lines, presented in further detail throughout the rest
and the best first step in a lifetime
journey in fantasy RPGs! Contains dice,
pawns, maps, and everything required for
The remastered Pathfinder Second Edition features four Core Rulebooks—Player Core, GM
Core, Monster Core, and Player Core 2. Numerous additional rulebooks offer new classes,
monsters, treasures, and additional ways to customize your Pathfinder experience.
From GM Screens to spell and monster cards to decks
designed to aid rules reference, chases, critical hits
and more, Pathfinder offers numerous game aids to
speed up play and crank up the fun!
Quarterly Adventure Path releases present entire Pathfinder campaigns, while stand-
alone modules ranging widely in level and theme provide near endless adventure
designed to challenge and reward your heroic adventurers.
Lost Omens world books present new
details and character options rooted in
the rich and ever-evolving lore of the
beset by magic and evil, tottering on
a sword’s edge of uncertainty and
desperate for the brave actions of

ACRONYM KEY: HC hardcover; PE softcover pocket edition;

SE special edition; SK sketch cover edition.

page.text: Leave the ordinary behind and take your first step into a world of amazing fantasy adventure with
the Pathfinder Beginner Box: Secrets of the Unlit Star! This box contains everything you need to
learn how to play the Pathfinder roleplaying game, including rules to create your own fantasy hero
and tools to tell your own incredible stories. This new version of the Beginner Box revitalizes player
options, including more ancestries and four different classes, and includes all-new adventures,
Will you be a mighty barbarian, cutting down your foes in a furious rage, or a nimble monk,
darting in and out of the fray with precise martial arts strikes? Maybe you’ll choose a bard’s music,
soothing and supporting your party, or maybe you’ll channel the ancient magic of your bloodline as
a powerful sorcerer. It’s all up to you!

text.b: Secrets of the Unlit Star includes:

page.text: • A 72-page Hero’s Handbook, including rules for character generation, a solo adventure, skills, spells,
• An 88-page Game Master’s Guide, containing an introductory adventure, over 20 pages of
monsters, rules for building your own adventure, and magic items.
• Four premade characters so you can jump right into the action and four blank character sheets if
you want to make your own hero.
• Over 100 character and monster pawns to use on the full-color double-sided adventure map.
• Four game reference cards to help players remember their actions.
• A complete set of polyhedral dice, including a d20, d12, d10, d8, d6, and d4.

text.b: Pathfinder Beginner Box: Secrets of the Unlit Star (May)

page.text: Pathfinder Player Core is the first core rulebook of the fully remastered Pathfinder Second
Edition RPG! These rules are compatible with previous Pathfinder Second Edition rulebooks,
incorporating comprehensive errata, rules updates, and some of the best additions from
later books into new, easier-to-access volumes with new presentations inspired by years of
player feedback. Along with the GM Core, Monster Core, and Player Core 2, this 464-page
rulebook provides a new foundation for the future of tabletop gaming!

text.b: Pathfinder Player Core Sketch Cover Hobby Retailer Edition

page.text: • Easier to learn! We’ve taken feedback from the Beginner Box and the
Pathfinder Core Rulebook and made this new entry into the Pathfinder
Roleplaying Game easier to navigate and get right into the fun.
• Complete character creation rules, walking you through building a
character by selecting your Ancestry, Background, and Class, with
a focus on the bard, cleric, druid, fighter, ranger, rogue, witch, and
wizard! Core ancestry options include human, dwarf, elf, gnome,
• A mountain of options allowing you to customize your character,
including versatile heritages, like the changeling and nephilim, skills
and feats, and hundreds of spells (including dozens of new ones),
ensuring that the character you build represents your hero not just in
story, but in rules as well!
• Everything you need to know to start playing, from advice on how to
explore the world to tips on surviving deadly combat with terrifying foes.
• A primer on the Lost Omens setting, so your character can be a part
of an exciting and diverse world!
• Rules and tools to advance your character through play, taking them
from a fresh-faced adventurer ready to take on the world to a veteran
hero, wielding powerful magic that can reshape reality!
• Fully integrated errata from the first four years of Pathfinder Second
Edition, including revisions to the witch, expanded options for every
character class, streamlined spells, new equipment, and more!
Pathfinder GM Core is the second core rulebook for the fully remastered Pathfinder Second
Edition RPG! This comprehensive 336-page rulebook gives Game Masters everything
they need to craft thrilling tales of adventure, from a single-night’s dungeon delve to
complex epics spanning years. Within these pages you’ll find clear guidelines for creating
new hazards and monsters, tools to design challenging, balanced encounters, and rules
for rewarding characters for overcoming the dastardly obstacles you array before them!
Pathfinder GM Core also contains a dragon’s hoard of magic items and treasure to entice
and reward your players, from simple healing potions to magic weapons and armor and
legendary artifacts, including dozens of brand-new items!

text.b: Pathfinder GM Core Sketch Cover Hobby Retailer Edition

page.text: • The rules needed to run a game of Pathfinder, including guidelines for
creating challenging encounters, determining success, and giving out
• Advice aimed at making you an incredible Game Master, along with
the tools to ensure you and everyone else at your table has a safe and
• Guidelines to help you create your own content, from campaigns and
• Rules subsystems to help you handle a wide array of game situations,
including rules for chases, duels, research, infiltration, and more!
• A guide to the Lost Omens setting, with a look at several important
regions, an examination of the peoples and cultures of the world, and
a glimpse into what lies beyond the veil of the Universe!
• Fully integrated errata from the first four years of Pathfinder Second
Edition, including improvements to staves and talismans and all-new
Pathfinder Monster Core is the third core rulebook for the fully remastered Pathfinder
Second Edition RPG! This 376-page book is packed with a wide range of monsters useful
to all Pathfinder campaigns, giving the Game Master plenty of threats to throw at their
adventurers, at any level of experience. The lavishly illustrated tome also includes
guidelines for reading monster entries and adjusting existing monsters to tailor fit your
story! This is the definitive resource for Pathfinder Second Edition monsters!

text.b: Pathfinder Monster Core Sketch Cover Hobby Retailer Edition

page.text: • Over 400 individual monster write-ups, including everything from
common animals, like wolves and bears, to terrifying supernatural
foes, such as the rune giant or the grim reaper!
• Eight brand-new dragons to challenge your players, including the
power-hungry fortune dragon, the peerless adamantine dragon, the
mischievous mirage dragon, the fiendish diabolic dragon, and more!
• Classic monsters drawn from mythology, like the minotaur and the
medusa, as well as creatures drawn from the legends of the Lost
Omens setting, including favorites like the wicked sinspawn and
• Simple templates that allow you to customize a monster, making it
more or less powerful with just a few simple adjustments.
• Guidelines for reading and using monster statistics, ensuring you get
the most out of a creature both in and out of combat.
• Lists of creatures sorted by both type and level, making it easy to find
the monster you need when you need it.
• Fully integrated errata from the first four years of Pathfinder Second
Edition, including new balance adjustments to ensure that every
creature presents a thrilling level-appropriate challenge!
• Hundreds of beautiful full-color creature illustrations!
Pathfinder Player Core 2 is the fourth core rulebook for the fully remastered Pathfinder
Second Edition RPG! This 320-page rulebook significantly expands the options
available to Pathfinder players, giving them the edge to take on any adventure. The
book remasters 8 classes from Pathfinder Second Edition, providing everything you
need to create a wide array of new characters, ready to take on the world. It also
includes more than 40 archetypes, expanded ancestries, and tons of feats, spells,
and alchemical items to provide a near-endless array of exciting options for every
Pathfinder character! The ideal character resource for players looking to move beyond

text.b: Pathfinder Player Core 2 Sketch Cover Hobby Retailer Edition

page.text: • Eight fully detailed classes, including the alchemist, barbarian,
champion, investigator, monk, oracle, sorcerer, and swashbuckler,
each containing multiple character paths, multiclassing options, and
• Expanded ancestry options include the catfolk, gnoll, hobgoblin,
kobold, lizardfolk, ratfolk, and tengu, alongside three versatile
heritages—the dhampir, duskwalker, and an all-new heritage debuting
• More than 40 archetypes, allowing you to further customize your
character’s story and abilities. Turn your hero into an aerial acrobat, a
high-riding cavalier, a treacherous pirate, and so much more!
• Spells, alchemical items, and magic items to round out the new classes and
to provide some new tricks to the classes from Pathfinder Player Core.
• Fully integrated errata from the first four years of Pathfinder Second
Edition, including a revised alchemist, champion, and oracle!
• Published under the new Open RPG Creative (ORC) license, giving
players and Game Masters even more freedom for making their own
creations based on Pathfinder Second Edition.
Despite how far heroes travel or how many times they save the day, there are always new
monsters lurking just around the corner. Pathfinder Monster Core 2 is a 376-page hardcover
bursting with brand-new creatures as well as updated Pathfinder classics clawing their way
to a place at your table. The lavishly illustrated tome also includes guidelines for reading
monster entries and adjusting existing monsters to tailor-fit your story! This book is a must-
have for Game Masters ready to bring new and exciting challenges to their games!

text.b: Pathfinder Monster Core 2 Sketch Cover Hobby Retailer Edition

page.text: • Over 300 individual monsters, including common foes, like dangerous
animals and mighty elementals, to deadly creatures that can threaten
even the most hardened heroes, such as the unsettling swarm
• Eight brand-new dragons to challenge your players, including the
powerful cinder dragon, the terrifying despair dragon, the steadfast
requiem dragon, the clever rune dragon, and more!
• Classic monsters drawn from mythology, like the coatl and the
garuda, as well as creatures drawn from the legends of Pathfinder’s
Lost Omens setting, including favorites like the majestic dweomercat
and the unstoppable Spawn of Rovagug!
• Simple templates that allow you to customize a monster, making it
more or less powerful with just a few quick adjustments.
• Guidelines for reading and using monster statistics, ensuring you get
the most out of a creature both in and out of combat.
• Lists of creatures sorted by both type and level, making it easy to find
the monster you need when you need it.
• Fully integrated errata from the first 5 years of Pathfinder Second
Edition, including new balance adjustments to ensure that every
creature presents a thrilling level-appropriate challenge!
• Hundreds of beautiful full-color creature illustrations!
The perfect spell can solve just about any problem. From simple cantrips to reality-
warping magic, this new rulebook contains a plethora of options for any adventurer who
wants to delve into the unknown and unlock their true magical potential. Within these
pages lies the magnificent spellcraft of four wonderfully magical and unique classes!
Strike with both spell and blade as a magus. Command an army of the undead as a
necromancer. Scribe unique magic onto enemies and allies alike as a runesmith. Fight
alongside a powerful magical companion as a summoner. You’ll also find over 240 spells
(some so impactful that they scar the soul), several fantastical archetypes that will bring
a magical twist to any table, new arcane schools derived from the heart of the Impossible
Lands themselves, and wondrous magical items that will allow even the most mundane
of characters to experience the power of magic. All of this is made manifest before you

text.b: Pathfinder Impossible Magic Sketch Cover Edition (August)

page.text: Step through the veil into the grandest party of two worlds. At the Yestereve Revels, every
kind of fey from lowly gremlin to towering warrior of the Wild Hunt joins the merrymaking.
Speak to a fey queen to receive a boon, sling mud with the grimiest muckdwellers, and
savor the taste of a decadent berry pie—even if it means you may never leave. Every delight
can be had at the Yestereve Revels!
At the gala and beyond, players and GMs can use creatures, items, archetypes and
more inspired by fey and fairy tales. Cast curses, transformations, and memory magic!
Be inspired by a trickster muse for bards! Ride a unicorn! Play fey ancestries—fauns,
gremlins, nymphs, and sprites—or choose the fadrim versatile heritage to add a bit of fey
magic to any character. Explore the world of the fey! Feybound also includes a gazetteer
of the First World, a first draft of the Universe the fey call home, and expanded details on
the godlike beings called the Eldest.
A god has been slain, and nothing shall ever be the
same again! As war and destruction spread across
the land, new heroes must rise to the occasion and
take up arms to protect the mortal world. Lay claim
to your own spark of divinity with two brand-new
character classes: charge into battle as a mighty
exemplar, or call upon the power of spiritual allies as
a wise animist. Alongside these new classes are rules
for running mythic games, archetypes for playing
legendary characters, and a wide array of new items,
spells, and monsters to tell stories straight out of
myth. Claim the power of the gods, and battle the
Universe’s most fearsome foes with War of Immortals!

text.b: Pathfinder War of Immortals Sketch Cover Hobby Retailer Edition
Pathfinder War of Immortals Special Edition
Pathfinder War of Immortals Pocket Edition

page.text: Steadfast allies, cunning enemies, and good old
shopkeepers—NPC Core brings the people of your
game world to life. Prepare and run your games faster
with a vast collection of non-player characters ready
to go at a moment’s notice. Special characters from
notable ancestries show off the unique themes of their
cultures. You’ll also find fun details to inspire your
specific NPCs, along with extra tools like familiars,
companions, ready-to-use spell lists, and NPC
relationship rules! Populate your world with NPC Core!

text.b: Pathfinder NPC Core Sketch Cover Hobby Retailer Edition

page.text: Report for duty! When diplomacy between nations
fails and neither side wishes to back down, war is
the inevitable result. From border skirmishes to
large-scale invasions, conflict comes in many forms—
the perfect chance for heroes to win glory! This new
rulebook covers all aspects of war, including two bold
new character classes! Help steer the flow of battle
as a cunning commander, or protect your allies from
harm as an indomitable guardian. You’ll also find
archetypes that allow you to raise a small battalion
of undead soldiers or wield a personal siege weapon,
a new larger-than-life ancestry, an armory of magic
weapons, and rules for running combat alongside
troops that you command to fill out your army’s ranks.
Golarion’s generals need you, so heed the Battlecry!

text.b: Pathfinder Battlecry! Sketch Cover Hobby Retailer Edition

page.text: If sword and spell aren’t enough to win the day, it’s
time to level up your game with clockwork gears,
lightning coils, and black powder! Guns & Gears
brings the excitement of firearms and fantasy
technology to your tabletop! Unravel the secrets
of clockworks with the new inventor class or
blow away your opposition as a firearm-wielding
gunslinger! In addition to these new classes, a
plethora of archetypes, backgrounds, vehicles, siege
engines, gadgets, and the new automaton ancestry
are all ready to expand your game with options for
battlefields large and small. Fully remastered to the
latest version of the Pathfinder RPG!
Pathfinder Treasure Vault reveals the glittering hoard of
a terrifying dragon, as presented by the creature’s plucky
a catalog of new gear from nearly every category of
equipment and magic item available in the Pathfinder
RPG while also introducing entirely new categories of
items as well—nearly 600 new items in all! Give your
character the perfect tool for the job with signature
weapons, customizable relics, and wondrous items to
fit your every need while preparing for any eventuality
with potions, elixirs, wands, and more! Fully remastered
to the latest version of the Pathfinder RPG!
From the fringes, the unknown beckons. Pathfinder
Dark Archive contains secrets that any player or
GM can use to reveal the paranormal lurking in their
classes perfect for delving into the unexplained:
Unleash the untold power of your mind as the
psychic, or leverage supernatural secrets and mystic

text.b: Pathfinder Dark Archive (Remastered) Sketch Cover Edition

page.text: Maintain the flow of combat with the Pathfinder
Combat Pad initiative tracker! List the names of heroes
and foes on included magnets using a wet- or dry-erase
marker, then place them in initiative order. Easily track
when a character delays their turn or starts dying by
sliding the magnets. Includes more than 80 magnets!
This sturdy four-panel horizontal screen features a
stunning battle scene on one side and handy charts
and game tables on the other side to give a busy GM
everything they need to run the Remastered Pathfinder
Divine your destiny with the Pathfinder Harrow Deck, the legendary fortune-telling cards
from Pathfinder’s Age of Lost Omens setting! With this set of 54 full-color, fortune-telling
cards, you’ll learn how to include the harrow in any tabletop RPG game and enhance play
with immersive fortune-telling methods and other insights. With vivid all-new art, exciting
print treatments, patterned backing, and a size common to many real-world tarot decks,
the Harrow Deck straddles the line between game supplement and storytelling set piece!
The vast variety of creatures from Pathfinder Monster Core 2 come alive on your tabletop
with this collection of more than 550 creature pawns for use with the Pathfinder
Roleplaying Game or any tabletop fantasy RPG! Printed on sturdy cardstock, each
double-sided pawn contains a beautiful full-color image of a creature from Pathfinder
Monster Core 2. Each pawn slots into a size-appropriate plastic base, making them easy
to mix with traditional metal or plastic miniatures.
Generals and goblins! Cavalry and clockworks! Angels and devils! The armed legions of
Pathfinder Battlecry! come alive on your tabletop with this collection of more than 225
creature pawns for use with the Pathfinder Roleplaying Game or any tabletop fantasy RPG!
Each double-sided pawn contains a beautiful full-color image of a creature, including a
plethora of troop NPCs, from foot soldiers and veteran military units to armies of animated
statues, hordes of undead, and massed spellcasters!
Keep every Pathfinder creature close at hand with this box-bursting collection of 450
reference cards featuring all the monsters from Pathfinder Monster Core! Each 4" x 6"
card is printed on sturdy cardstock and features a beautiful, full-color image of a Monster
Core monster on one side, while the other side provides that monster’s statistics for quick
Hundreds of friends, foes, and bystanders stand assembled in this complete collection
of characters drawn from Pathfinder NPC Core! Each 4" x 6" card is printed on sturdy
cardstock and features a beautiful, full-color image of an NPC Core character on
one side, while the other side provides that character’s statistics for quick and easy
This essential accessory for arcane spellcasters
collects all of the arcane spells from Pathfinder Player
Core and Pathfinder Player Core 2. More than 250
spell reference cards put unrivaled understanding of
the arcane directly into your hands!
This must-have accessory is a comprehensive
collection of all the primal spells presented in
Pathfinder Player Core and Pathfinder Player Core 2.
Put the bounty of nature at your fingertips with over
This essential accessory features the full pantheon
of divine spells from Pathfinder Player Core and
Pathfinder Player Core 2. Honor the higher powers
Unlock the potential of your inner magic with
Pathfinder Remaster: Focus Spell Cards! This must-
have accessory for characters with that little extra
bit of magic features all the focus spells from
Pathfinder Player Core and Pathfinder Player Core
Open your mind to the unknown! Featuring all of
the occult spells from Pathfinder Player Core and
Pathfinder Player Core 2 on over 240 reference
cards, this is a vital accessory for those who
These 108 cards include rules for the Pathfinder
reminder text you can read at a glance. Multiple
copies of the most crucial conditions mean
there are enough for the whole table, and a
set of tracking cards lets you easily monitor
As the Hellfire Crisis dawns and spreads its turmoil
throughout Avistan, the nation of Isger is stirred to
action by the rebel organization the Hellbreakers
League, which seeks to free Isger from its oppressor,
the infernal nation of Cheliax. Player characters
will carry out daring missions against Chelaxian
strongholds, face off with the deadly Hellknights,
and strike out against the forces of Hell itself! On the
way, they’ll run into dangerous enemies both new
and old and uncover long-lost secrets powerful and
ancient. Can the PCs stoke the fires of revolution and
throw off the diabolic chains of Cheliax or will they
be ground beneath the boot of oppression? Join the
Hellbreakers and do your part! A complete Pathfinder
campaign for levels 1 to 10! Includes a gazetteer of
the lands and people that make up the nation of
Isger and a look into the cults of Urgathoa, as well
as useful new items, exciting character options, and
War between the hell-sworn nation of Cheliax and
its old enemy Andoran ripples across the Inner Sea.
Yet Cheliax’s greatest foe might be its own long-
there when Cheliax declares martial law and seals
its borders. These heroes won’t just free themselves;
they’ll unite the infernal empire’s worst enemies to
defeat Cheliax on land, by sea, and even to the depths
Hell’s Destiny is a complete Adventure Path
designed for four characters, starting at 10th
level and reaching 20th level by the campaign’s
conclusion. Hell’s Destiny also includes a gazetteer
of the dynamic port city of Corentyn, an exploration
into Cheliax’s diabolical aristocracy, as well as useful
new items, exciting character options, and a host of
Florin Kindler lost her parents to one of Ustalav’s
most notorious hauntings—they perished, as so
many have, after a visit from the Black Coach of
Bastardhall. Arguably the most notorious of all the
haunted castles in the Inner Sea region, Bastardhall’s
mysteries have brought Florin and her adventuring
companions in search of answers to the centuries-long
curse that blights the ruins, but the castle has other
plans than simply giving up is secrets, as those
who dare to enter its haunted halls are doomed to
vanish forever. Will your PCs be able to break the
curse of Bastardhall and escape, or are they fated to
become the latest in a long line of vanishings into
one of Golarion’s most infamous ruins? The Bastion of
Blasphemies Adventure Path is a complete Pathfinder
campaign by Pathfinder co-creator James Jacobs,
with adventures ranging from level 5 to 13, making
it the perfect follow-up for players who have finished
the Troubles in Grayce Adventure Anthology.
Trouble rumbles in the Darklands beneath the world’s surface! Ley lines twisted by
the godlike vault builders ages ago have begun to unwind, devastating subterranean
communities. These vaultlines shake all the Darklands, from the claustrophobic tunnels
of Nar-Voth to the wondrous caverns of Sekamina and the continent-sized vaults of Orv.
Meanwhile, patient and cunning serpentfolk seize on the chaos to finally wrest control of
the world from humanity, the hated foes who drove them into the darkness long ago. Your
PCs escape a dire fate during a subterranean prison break, but a powerful villain intent
on dominating the lands below and above the surface is freed as well. Now you must
race through the monster-infested Darklands, from claustrophobic tunnels to jungle-filled
hidden worlds, pursuing an enemy connected to an ageless evil. Schemes of the ancient
vault builders and Yig, the Father of Serpents, are now unearthed. Can you untangle
sinister plots and ancient rivalries set into motion before human reckoning? The vault
builders may have formed the Cradle of the Darklands long ago, but you will decide who
rules it! The Vaultlines Adventure Path is a complete Pathfinder campaign for 11th- to
Something strange is happening to your hometown of
Willowshore! Nestled on the banks of a river winding
through the legendary Specterwood in Tian Xia’s
haunted land of Shenmen, the people of Willowshore
are no strangers to supernatural threats, but the
danger that comes to town on the first day of summer
is unlike anything you’ve ever seen before. Over the
four seasons to come, you and your fellow home-
grown heroes must face evil spirits, sinister fiends,
and frightening curses, lest the town of Willowshore
succumb to the Season of Ghosts! The Season of Ghosts
Adventure Path is a four-part series of connected
adventures that form a complete Pathfinder horror

text.b: Season of Ghosts Adventure Path Special Edition

page.text: After they walked through that glowing gateway,
nothing was ever the same. A band of characters
becomes paranormal investigators in order to figure
out the cause of a global amnesiac episode. Their quest
takes them to lands near, far, and outside this reality
altogether. Along the way, the characters meet fellow
strange realms also touched by the so-called Missing
Moment. And when it comes time to learn the grim
truth of what happened to them on that fated summer
night, what then? The Gatewalkers Adventure Path is a
three-part series of connected adventures that form a
complete Pathfinder campaign ranging from level 1 to 11.

text.b: Pathfinder Gatewalkers Adventure Path Hardcover Special Edition

page.text: The Kingmaker Adventure Path presents a full-length campaign
that chronicles the rise of a new nation—a kingdom built and ruled
by your player characters! Face off against bands of bloodthirsty
bandits, deadly and dangerous monsters, and mysterious menaces
from other realities as you fight to claim the Stolen Lands as your
own. Will you rule with justice and mercy, or will you become
the very monsters you fought to oppose? In the Kingmaker
Adventure Path, the destiny of the world’s newest nation is yours
to decide! The Kingmaker Adventure Path is a six-part series of
connected adventures that form a complete Pathfinder campaign

text.b: Kingmaker Flip-Mat: River Kingdoms Ruins Multi-Pack

page.text: Enter the megadungeon! Evil stirs in the depths of
the Abomination Vaults, a sprawling dungeon where
the evil sorcerer Belcorra Haruvex attempted to raise
an army of monsters hundreds of years ago. Brave
heroes must venture into a dungeon full of beasts and
traps to prevent a spiteful villain from rising again!
The Abomination Vaults Adventure Path is a three-part
series of connected adventures that form a complete
Pathfinder campaign ranging from level 1 to 11.

text.b: Abomination Vaults Adventure Path Special Edition Hardcover

page.text: The time has come again for the Ruby Phoenix
Tournament! The sorcerer Hao Jin has invited
only the strongest martial artists, adventurers,
and fortune seekers to her world-famous fighting
competition. A motley roster of contenders must
compete for this decade’s champion title and their
choice of one of the Ruby Phoenix’s grand treasures.
Who will come out on top, and who will be left in
the dust? There’s only one way to find out! The Fists
of the Ruby Phoenix Adventure Path is a three-part
series of connected adventures that form a complete
Pathfinder campaign ranging from level 11 to 20.

text.b: Fists of the Ruby Phoenix Adventure Path Hardcover
Fists of the Ruby Phoenix Pawn Collection
PATHFINDER GAME NIGHT: DAWN OF THE FROGS

page.text: Gather your friends for the perfect taste of the Pathfinder RPG with this deluxe boxed
set adventure designed specifically for brand new players! The small village of Bog
Bottom has a problem—locals have been going missing near an old, abandoned mill in the
surrounding swamp known as Dunmire. But what awaits discovery in this ruin is far more
sinister than a few wayward villagers—Bog Bottom is going to need a new band of heroes
if it hopes to survive the upcoming Dawn of the Frogs!
Pathfinder Game Night: Dawn of the Frogs presents three short adventures for 1st-
level characters set in the swamp of Dunmire and includes four pregenerated player
characters, poster maps presenting all combat locations, a sheet of pawns representing
the PCs and enemies, dice, and a 32-page adventure book!

text.b: Pathfinder Game Night: Dawn of the Frogs
PATHFINDER GAME NIGHT: THE DRAGON’S CROWN

page.text: Take your first steps into a world of high adventure with this deluxe boxed set adventure
designed specifically for brand new players! Not all dragons are mighty and cruel. Some
are small and friendly, but even the tiniest dragons covet their wealth. So when a house
drake’s beloved crown is stolen by a pesky imp who leaves her for dead after a fight atop
the rooftops of the city of Korvosa, it falls to a fresh-faced band of heroes to step in and
save the day! But who could have guessed that a frantic chase after a thieving imp over
city roofs could lead to a mission against one of the neighborhood’s newest crime lords—the
mysterious (and likely awful) King Stankus? Can you face threats that span from Korvosa’s
heights to its rancid sewer depths and emerge with the dragon’s crown? This box contains
everything you need to play three short single-night adventures for 1st-level heroes and
includes four pregenerated player characters, poster maps presenting all combat locations,
a sheet of pawns representing the PCs and enemies, dice, and a 32-page adventure book!

text.b: Pathfinder Game Night: The Dragon’s Crown (October)

page.text: The perfect next step after the Beginner Box! The idyllic calm in the hardworking town of
Grayce has been shaken by recent events and its people need help. Thankfully, a group of
adventurers recently arrived in town, fresh off their first adventure! This action-packed
anthology of six short adventures deeply immerses players in the town introduced in the
Beginner Box, setting a light horror tone that calls for heroism. The anthology includes
a dangerous cryptid hunt, the exploration of a sinister scientist’s abandoned home, the
devious and deadly plot of a hidden hag, and even tracking down a murderous vampire!
Each adventure includes a level’s worth of experience and can be played independently or
as part of a larger connected story that leads to the Bastion of Blasphemies Adventure Path!
Delve into ancient secrets below the City at the Center of the World in this hardcover
campaign-arc adventure for characters level 1–7! Captured by a hryngar clan somewhere
in the maze of tunnels below the city of Absalom, the heroes stage a bloody revolt and
battle their way into the long-lost Sanctum of Aroden, a legendary religious refuge sealed
away from the world with the god of humanity’s death a century ago. But some secrets
are best left buried forever, and investigation into the mysterious Dead God’s Hand, said
to be hidden at the heart of the complex, uncovers machinations that could threaten
all of Absalom with the birth of a terrible new divinity! Based on Pathfinder Publisher
Erik Mona’s multi-year, multi-group office Pathfinder campaign, The Dead God’s Hand is a
deadly adventure filled with dungeon exploration, ancient mysteries, and phantasmagoric
tests that see the player characters reliving events from the life of Aroden, the dead god
of humanity whose murder triggered the beginning of the current age!

text.b: The Dead God’s Hand Special Edition (September)
Pathfinder Flip-Mat: The Dead God’s Hand Multi-Pack (September)

page.text: The town of Falcon’s Hollow is no stranger to peril,
yet the danger growing nearby poses a threat that
only a new band of heroes can handle. Ravenous
undead, cunning kobolds, and sinister necromancers
are but a few of the menaces facing the small lumber
town, yet none are as dangerous as the Kobold King
himself! This deluxe 128-page hardcover gathers three
classic Pathfinder adventures into an unforgettable
compilation, updating them to Pathfinder Second
Edition and expanding them into a mini-campaign
with a brand-new dungeon for heroes to explore. Will
your heroes save Falcon’s Hollow from the Kobold
King, or are they doomed to become the king’s latest
trophies? Crown of the Kobold King is a deluxe super-

text.b: Pathfinder Flip-Mat: Crown of the Kobold King

page.text: Claws of the Tyrant is a hardcover anthology of
three interconnected adventures set in the ravaged
nation of Lastwall, now known as the Gravelands.
“Gravelands Survivors” (1st level) follows a group of
refugees as they race to keep a holy artifact from the
clutches of a vile graveknight. In “Ashes for Ozem”
(7th level), the players are evil agents assembled by
the graveknight to infiltrate a stronghold of good and
destroy it from within. In “Of Blood and Faith” (18th
level), the Knights of Lastwall and their allies prepare
for a final confrontation to end the graveknight’s
From the crumbling spires of the ancient runelords in distant Varisia to the bustling
merchant kingdoms of the Inner Sea, Pathfinder’s Lost Omens campaign setting forms the
panoramic backdrop for Paizo’s innovative Pathfinder fantasy roleplaying supplements,
Golarion is a world beset by danger. To the north, the undead armies of the Whispering
Tyrant converge into a massive army, their loose jaws slavering for the flesh of the living,
while long-simmering tensions between the nations of Andoran, Taldor, and Cheliax
threaten to bloom into open warfare. In the east, guillotine blades fall daily amid the
eternal revolutions of Galt, while to the west the thrice-damned House of Thrune rules a
great diabolical empire in dangerous decline.
And at the heart of it all rises Absalom, City at the Center of the World, where anything
can be bought and sold and the Pathfinder Society seeks adventurous new recruits to
seek out the lost treasures and hidden secrets of the world...

text.b: Lost Omens World Guide Special Edition

page.text: This indispensable 136-page hardcover guidebook to the
world of Pathfinder presents everything you need to know for
a lifetime of adventure in the uncertain Age of Lost Omens.
The god of humanity is dead and prophecy is broken, leaving
adventuring heroes like you to carve their own destinies out
of an uncertain future! This gazetteer features 10 diverse
regions packed with thrilling and deadly possibilities and is
accompanied by a giant two-sided poster map depicting the
heart of the Pathfinder setting. Detailed character backgrounds
for each region root your character even more deeply into the
campaign setting. It’s the perfect starting place for newcomers
to Pathfinder and the most concise, up-to-date presentation of
the Age of Lost Omens for Pathfinder Second Edition.
Dragons! The very name invokes power beyond
reckoning, fire that can melt mountains, and fangs the
size of swords. To face a dragon is to face the ultimate
challenge of any adventurer’s career. The reward for
victory: gold, enough to twist any mortal’s heart into a
bigger monster than the one they just slew. Inside this
224-page tome lies the secrets of dragonkind, as well as
those mortals who look upon them with awe or bitter
envy. Research a fearsome foe or summon the courage
to make an ally of these primordial beings and put your
strength and wisdom to the test. Success will see triumph
beyond measure, while failure leads to an ignominious

text.b: Lost Omens Draconic Codex Special Edition

page.text: A single spark has ignited the dry tinder of decades-
long saber-rattling into the full-fledged inferno of the
Hellfire Crisis, embroiling an entire region in the war
between infernal Cheliax and its former holding, Andoran.
Dispatches from each front reveal the past and present of
the war, along with how the right group of heroes might
shape the future of the conflict. In addition to news of
the war and fronts where heroes might win important
victories, this 128-page setting sourcebook provides new
options for factions involved in the conflict. The Eagle
Knights loyal to Andoran and the Hellknights divided
by Cheliax’s wartime demands were there when the first
blows were struck. Others were pulled in as the crisis
spread to their homes, from shadowy Nidal to the halls of
power in Absalom and from the already-bloody forests of
Nirmathas to settlements beneath the Inner Sea.

text.b: Lost Omens Hellfire Dispatches Special Edition (April)

page.text: Set a course for grand adventures with this expansive
hardcover guide to the open waters of the Inner Sea.
Since time immemorial, the people of Golarion have
been traveling out to the sea to gather resources, ply
their trades, and seek secrets both above and below the
water. Explore the failed utopia of the island of Hermea,
the home of deadly Red Mantis assassins on Mediogalti
Island, the mysteries of the Mordant Spire grown from
the remains of a dead god, the countless pirate-scoured
islands of the Shackles, or the dangerous depths of
underwater regions. Each entry within this gazetteer
includes the history, culture, and current events of the
region, as well as a major city to include in a variety
of adventures. The book also includes new character
options and a fold-out poster map!

text.b: Lost Omens High Seas Special Edition (July)

page.text: As the Hellfire Crisis comes to an end, the powers that be must reckon with a changed
world. Within the Infernal Inheritance dwell scheming nobles, remnants of ancient
empires, and diabolic dangers. Explore Cheliax, a devil-bound nation transformed by
war; Corentyn, a naval power establishing its militaristic and economical might; Isger,
a recently liberated nation discovering its forgotten past; Nidal, a nation wreathed in
shadow and bound to a wicked god; Ravounel, a former Chelaxian holding that’s seeking
its own place in the world; and Scorchhome, a nation for goblins and other outcasts. Each
entry within this gazetteer includes the history, culture, and current events of the region,
as well as a major city to include in a variety of adventures. The book also includes new
character options and a fold-out poster map!

text.b: Lost Omens Cheliax, Infernal Inheritance Special Edition (October)
Lost Omens Cheliax Poster Map Archive (November)

page.text: Explore a region of classical high fantasy with this
expansive hardcover guide to six key nations of the Inner
Sea. Within the Shining Kingdoms dwell noble knightly
orders, proud ancient cultures, and deadly courtly
intrigue. Explore Andoran, a bastion of democratic
governance and freedom for all; Druma, a trade hub
obsessed with material gain; the Five Kings Mountains,
home to the fractured kingdoms of the dwarves; Galt, a
land wracked from violence and revolution; Kyonin, the
illusion-cloaked homeland of the elves; and Taldor, the
ossified remnants of one of the most powerful empires
in the Inner Sea. Each nation features an in-depth
history, gazetteer, and a look at a major city to support a
grand variety of adventures. The book also includes new
character options and a fold-out poster map!

text.b: Lost Omens Shining Kingdoms Special Edition
Lost Omens Shining Kingdoms Poster Map Archive

page.text: Investigate the demon-haunted Sarkoris Scar and gather
the wisdom of its scattered people in a convocation of the
finest minds of the Age of Lost Omens! Adventure and
research sites around the Sarkoris Scar are presented
by local experts. The fascinating variety of visiting
scholars likewise speaks to possibilities from joint
research and lifelong bonds to political machinations
and bitter rivalries. These visitors have each brought
their own items, spells, and other research, including
the remastered runelord archetype. Learn from the best
in this content-packed sourcebook for players and GMs!

text.b: Lost Omens Rival Academies Special Edition

page.text: This 320-page hardcover resource for both players
and Game Masters is a comprehensive look at all
things divine, making it an essential addition to any
Pathfinder Second Edition campaign and a remastered
update and expansion of the popular volume Lost Omens
Gods & Magic! The book updates domains, spells, and
other mechanics. These include expansions on existing
classes like new witch patrons, new archetypes like
the Rivethun emissary and powerful mortal herald, and
new class archetypes like the battle harbinger option
for clerics. The book also includes brand new character
options and several additional divine entities never
before explored in any Pathfinder reference!

text.b: Lost Omens Divine Mysteries Special Edition

page.text: In a land still scarred by a war between two undying
archmages and their respective nations, reality
defies the rules binding the rest of the world. Cities
crafted by wishes and fields harvested by the
walking dead lay astride lands where magic warps
and twists with an undefinable will. Explore the
history of immortal wizard-kings, wield explosive
and unusual technology, and channel awe-inspiring
legends in a region where the present is still haunted
by the past, and echoes of destruction still shudder
across the minds and souls of those who brave the

text.b: Lost Omens Impossible Lands Special Edition
LOST OMENS TIAN XIA WORLD GUIDE

page.text: Dragons once served as the stewards of the lands of
Tian Xia, commanded by Heavenly decree. Can you live
up to their lofty expectations, or will you flounder and
fail like countless kingdoms before you? Prophecy is
dead and history hangs on a feather; even the slightest
breath might change the course of peoples and nations.
Strike out and seize your destiny in an uncertain future!
This massive 304-page gazetteer features a look at
the history, cultures, and peoples of Tian Xia, with
summaries of over 20 distinct nations and kingdoms on,
above, and under the continent. It’s accompanied by a
giant poster map displaying this region of the Pathfinder

text.b: Lost Omens Tian Xia World Guide
Lost Omens Tian Xia World Guide Special Edition
LOST OMENS TIAN XIA CHARACTER GUIDE

page.text: The boundless continent of Tian Xia features innumerable peoples, each with their own
rich history and practices. Bring your character to life with this 136-page hardcover
guidebook crammed full of everything a player might need to build a hero hailing from or
journeying through these vast lands, including:

text.b: Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide
Lost Omens Tian Xia Character Guide Special Edition

page.text: • Six new ancestries, including the reincarnating samsaran,
trickster tanuki, and shadowy wayang, as well as
Tian-inspired additional feats and heritages for existing
ancestries, like the peachchild leshy, bakuwa lizardfolk, and
• Feats inspired by Tian Xia’s diverse arts and practices, from
new elemental medicine to alchemically fortified cuisine to
how the zodiac can guide your character’s path.
• Spectacular magical and martial techniques to vanquish
the toughest opponents, whether that’s through weightless
sword arts or by borrowing the ancient power of magical
• Dazzling new magic items and weapons to forge or find,
from the subtle kotodama whistle to legendary artifacts like
For nearly 5,000 years, the great city of Absalom has
stood at the center of the Inner Sea region’s culture,
commerce, and prophecy. Now, after the death of its
founder-god Aroden, the disappearance of its lord
mayor, and new attacks from some of its greatest
foes, Absalom stands at the crossroads of a new
hardcover guide presents a fascinating locale suitable
for years of Pathfinder adventures! A huge poster map
of the city, more than 250 locations, and more than 400
interconnected NPCs set the scene in unprecedented
detail, beckoning your characters to walk upon streets
paved with centuries of history. Follow in the footsteps
of generations of questing heroes to chart a new path
for the City at the Center of the World!

text.b: Lost Omens Absalom, City of Lost Omens
Lost Omens Absalom, City of Lost Omens Special Edition
Lost Omens City of Lost Omens Poster Map Folio

page.text: South of a forbidding range of mountain peaks lies a land of boundless resources and
untold opportunity. The Mwangi Expanse has been home to a wide variety of cultures and
peoples since time immemorial, hosting powerful, isolated city-states that have often paid
little attention to their neighbors. Yet the turning tides of fortune have begun to usher in
changes that are rippling across the world—a band of scholars from an ancient university

text.b: Lost Omens Mwangi Expanse Special Edition

page.text: venture north to aid a disaster-torn Avistan. A
against foreign aggression. An undead god, once a
symbol of hope to his declining nation, now grows
jealous enough to turn on his self-proclaimed kin.
Whether you’re a diplomat seeking leverage from
the most difficult of positions, a spy searching
for the subtlest hint of danger from your
surroundings, a guardian hoping to protect your
home and people, or a warrior striking back at
tyrants both native and foreign, this 310-page
hardcover guide to the Mwangi Expanse offers
you the ultimate resource to explore a realm of
On tabletops around the world, the Flip-Mat
revolution is changing the way players run their
fantasy roleplaying games! Portable, durable, and
unfolded and 8" × 10" folded. A Flip-Mat’s coated
surface can handle any dry-erase, wet-erase, or
Why spend your time sketching out scenery on
a smudgy plastic mat when dynamic encounters
and easy clean-up are just a flip away!

text.b: Flip-Mat: Planes of Metal and Wood
Flip-Mat: The Dead God’s Hand Multi-Pack (Sept)

page.text: These days, we’re focusing all our new Pathfinder releases on Pathfinder Second Edition,
but many players out there still play and enjoy Pathfinder First Edition! Paizo is committed
to keeping the bulk of our First Edition rulebooks in print in our popular paperback
Pocket Edition format, and several items from the backlist remain strong sellers more
than a decade after their original release! Complete your Pathfinder collection by starting
at the very beginning, and keep the spirit of early Pathfinder alive forever!
For many years, the farmers, loggers, and woodworkers of Falcon’s Hollow have lived
a simple, prosperous life, despite dwelling in the shadow of Droskar’s Crag, a massive
volcano that looms on the other side of Darkmoon Vale. The dungeons carved into that
mountain were once a den for monsters that menaced the region, but they’ve lain quiet
for over 10 years. Now, something stirs in the depths once more, causing the restless
dead to pour forth and the mountain to belch smoke and ash, threatening every living
person and creature in the Vale! Do you and your fellow adventurers have what it takes
to turn the tide and get to the bottom of this mystery?
In Pathfinder Quest, you make your own character by selecting from a diverse range
of ancestries, backgrounds, and classes, giving you the skills and abilities needed to face
off against the undead horde and discover what’s behind their sudden resurgence. Each
session, you and your fellow players will undertake a single adventure, braving a series of
encounters that form one part of a larger ongoing narrative. Throughout each adventure,
you’ll face deadly foes and difficult challenges, as defined by the Adventure Book, but
don’t expect to learn all the game’s secrets so easily! The consequences of your actions
and choices are revealed in the Challenge Book only after you’ve made them, ensuring
that there’s always another mystery to solve. As you play through the campaign, your
characters will grow in power, gaining new feats and spells that enable you to face even
more powerful foes and gather wondrous treasure. Throughout this campaign, your
actions will shape the end of the story through the record of your deeds and the choices
The only thing more dangerous than the denizens of the world of Pathfinder is Golarion’s
monstrous dating scene! In Pathfinder Monster Match!, compete with your friends to
court all kinds of curious creatures, from vivacious vampires and dashing dragons to… a
sentient pile of ooze? Why not! When animus turns to amorousness, a whole new world
Players will take their monstrous romantic prospects on a wide array of dates to get
to know them better and give gifts to demonstrate their affection, all in hopes of finding
Pathfinder Monster Match! supports 2 to 6 love-starved adventurers and takes about
20-30 minutes to play. The game includes 80 cards, 90 wooden heart tokens, and 84
In Spellfinder, the silly, spell-slinging party game for 3—7 student wizards, players are taking
their final exam at a prestigious magical university, mashing up magic words to create
problem-solving spells! With thousands of possible scenarios and countless spells, you’ll
have a blast coming up with zany magical solutions to the perils that plague high fantasy
townsfolk—from mundane to mystical—and you’ll never play the same game twice!

i.b: “This spell turns flowers into iron, so
they can’t be destroyed by a druid’s

page.text: Only the most favored of the gods can win the dice-drafting game Pathfinder Dice Gods!
On your turn, pick one of 8 iconic gods from the Pathfinder pantheon and roll their unique
12-sided die, using symbols you get to play a variety of minigames, scoring points and
chaining success into more success. Compete with up to 4 other players, using both luck
and tactical play to win this fast-paced game of divine dominance.
Take on the role of an elemental
of reality in this fast-moving game
and a game constantly in flux, you’ll
never play the same way twice. And
with a quick playtime, there’s always
a chance for one more game…
Though the original rules were lost in the period of galactic amnesia known as the Gap,
people in the Pact Worlds and beyond have created all manner of games for this 65-card
deck of playing cards. Four such games are presented in this box for a game night with
friends and family—or for use in your Starfinder RPG campaigns!
: A high-stakes betting game where you try to collect the best hand by
: Scour the wreck of a starship to collect the most valuable goods.
: Jaunt between planets to complete more mercenary contracts than your
: Test your wits against another player to smuggle contraband items or
catch them in the act of smuggling.
Valeros is a veteran adventurer whose life as a mercenary lies far in his past. When
military conflict erupts, however, more aspects of Valeros’s past come crashing into the
present day. Now, separated from his longtime adventuring companions by a burgeoning
war and vast distances, Valeros must rely on new allies to prevent a diabolic dragon’s
sinister machinations from coming to fruition.
In an exciting race against the clock, Valeros must make himself part of the crew of
the Wandering Star, under the command of former pirate and current Andoren operative
Torius Vin, hoping to reach the site of a nascent Hellmouth—a living portal to Hell—before
a dragon can use it and a sliver of a slain god to upset the balance of power in the region.
With the aid of the enigmatic sorcerer and spy Vee, the naga oracle Celeste, and a young
Eagle Knight with her own ties to Valeros’s past,
the iconic fighter and the crew of Wandering
Star must overcome the forces of Hell with the
fate of Golarion hanging in the balance.
From fan-favorite fantasy author Chris A.
and family drama on the high seas, set in the
award-winning Age of Lost Omens setting for
Hellmouth is the perfect entry point to the
Hellfire Crisis event within the Pathfinder
setting, a multi-year conflict that will pull the
world’s most powerful nations into all-out war.
Five hundred years ago, a band of adventurers known as the Roseguard defeated
a powerful sorcerer named Belcorra Haruvex, foiling her plot to destroy the teeming
metropolis of Absalom. But this victory came with a great sacrifice, and the surviving
members of the Roseguard founded the town of Otari near the site of their battle, naming
it after their fallen comrade. Now, the lens atop Belcorra’s Gauntlight once again gleams
with eldritch power, and it falls to a new Roseguard to prevent the sorcerer’s plans from
For ambitious dwarven bard, Cade, this is a chance to finally make a name for herself
and earn acceptance into the Pathfinder Society, while veteran adventurer and Pathfinder
Ezren may find himself in over his head as he strives both to uncover the mystery of
Gauntlight Keep and the Abomination Vaults below, and keep Cade alive as she takes her
first steps toward a life of adventure.
The most popular megadungeon in Pathfinder’s Lost Omens setting is now an exciting
novel from veteran author Erik Scott de Bie. Whether you’ve experienced the Abomination
Vaults as a player, Game Master, in the action RPG video game adaptation from BKOM
Studios, or you’re new to the famed vaults of madness, this exciting novel is for you!
Starfinder is a galaxy-spanning science-fantasy RPG that
allows players to experience a unique blend of magic and
technology as they travel to exotic worlds, encounter
strange civilizations, and delve into ancient ruins, all in the
distant future of the Pathfinder setting.
Blast off into a galaxy of adventure with the Starfinder
Roleplaying Game! Step into your powered armor and grab
your magic-infused laser pistol as you investigate the
mysteries of a weird universe with your bold starship crew.
Will you delve for lost artifacts in the ruins of an alien
temple? Strap on rune-enhanced armor and a laser rifle to
battle undead empires in their fleets of bone ships? Defend
colonists from a swarm of ravenous monsters? Maybe
you’ll hack into the mainframe of a god-run corporation
or search the stars for clues to the secret history of the
universe. Whether you’re making first contact with new
cultures on uncharted worlds or fighting to survive in the
neon-lit back alleys of Absalom Station, you and your team
will need all your wits, combat skill, and magic to make it
through. But most of all, you’ll need each other.
With regularly released rulebooks, adventures, accessories,
and maps, Starfinder provides deep support for both players
and GMs. It’s an infinite universe out there, and Starfinder
RPG products are your portal to exploring every parsec of it!

text.i: Tales from the Vast Adventure Anthology HC, SE

page.text: Rescue on Raxil (Free RPG Day Adventure)

text.i: Secrets of the Swarm Adventure Path HC, SE

text.b: ACRONYM KEY: HC hardcover; PE softcover pocket edition;
ACRONYM KEY: HC hardcover; PE softcover pocket edition;
SE special edition; SK retailer retro cover edition.
SE special edition; SK retailer retro cover edition.

page.text: Starfinder Player Core is the definitive entry point for Starfinder Second Edition, packed with
everything a player needs to learn how to play the game! Choose from 10 ancestries, six character
classes, and hundreds of feats and spells to create unique characters ready to venture out into a
ruthless galaxy awash with magic and opportunity. Starfinder Player Core brings Starfinder into its
new edition and is now 100% compatible with the acclaimed Second Edition of the hit Pathfinder
Roleplaying Game. This book, together with GM Core, Alien Core, and Tech Core, provides a new
foundation for the future of tabletop gaming!

text.b: Starfinder Player Core Hobby Retailer Edition

page.text: • Complete character creation rules, walking you through
building a character by selecting your Ancestry,
Background, and Class, with a focus on the envoy,
mystic, operative, solarian, soldier, and witchwarper!
Core ancestry options include android, barathu, human,
kasatha, lashunta, pahtra, shirren, skittermander, vesk,
• A vast array of options allowing you to customize your
character, including versatile heritages like the undead
borai and Drift-touched prismeni, skills and feats, and
hundreds of spells, ensuring that the character you
build represents your hero not just in story, but in rules
• A primer on the Pact Worlds and wider galaxy, so your
character can be a part of an exciting and diverse setting!
• Rules and tools to advance your character through play,
taking them from a fresh-faced adventurer ready to take
on the world to a veteran hero, wielding powerful magic
Unleash your imagination, creating new galaxies and tales with Starfinder GM Core for Starfinder
Second Edition! This comprehensive 264-page rulebook gives Game Masters everything they need
to craft thrilling tales of adventure, from a single-night’s mission on the mean streets to complex
epics spanning years. Within these pages, you’ll find clear guidelines for creating new hazards
and alien creatures, tools to design challenging, balanced encounters, and rules for rewarding
characters for facing the dastardly challenges you array before them! It also contains rules for
quick-to-run cinematic starship combat and dynamic hacking! Starfinder GM Core is the second core
rulebook for the Starfinder Second Edition RPG! Along with Player Core, Alien Core, and Tech Core,
this book is a critical piece of the new foundation for the future of tabletop gaming!

text.b: Starfinder GM Core Hobby Retailer Edition

page.text: • The rules needed to run a game of Starfinder, including
determining success, and giving out rewards.
• Advice aimed at making you an incredible Game Master,
along with tools to ensure you and everyone else at
your table has a safe and enjoyable experience.
• Guidelines to help you create your own content, from
campaigns and adventures to hazards and monsters.
• Rules subsystems to help you handle a wide array of
game situations, including rules for chases, cinematic
starship combat, research, hacking infiltration, and
• A guide to the Pact Worlds and wider galaxy, with a
look at several important regions and an exploration of
Inside Starfinder Alien Core, you’ll find over 200 creatures, including science fantasy favorites like
robots, spacefaring fey, and all-new dragons; alien beasts from friendly spiderlike empathnids to
fearsome plantlike predator ksariks; and unique monsters that threaten the galaxy of Starfinder,
like jinsul troopers and vicious Swarm subspecies. You’ll also find legacy Pathfinder creatures
with a sci-fi update, like nanite-infused alghollthus, and Starfinder classics like akatas and laser
wolves. These creatures cover all levels of play, from scavenging sluglike diathas to powerful
Drift-dwelling spectra. Fully compatible with Pathfinder Second Edition!
• Over 200 individual alien write-ups, including common
foes, like glitch-spawning gremlins, robots programmed
for assassination, and mindless cybernetic zombies,
to unique creatures that can threaten even the most
experienced interstellar explorers, such as Akiton’s
dreaded illumantula and the giant Castrovelian ooze
known as the Terror or Ukulam!
• Representative combatants from some of the Starfinder
setting’s most iconic organizations, including the Azlanti Star
Empire’s Aeon Guards, the imperious Hellknights, nature-
loving Xenowardens, the undead crew of the infamous
• Simple creature adjustments that allow you to customize
a monster, tuning its power level or theme with just a few
• Guidelines for reading and using alien statistics, ensuring you
get the most out of a creature both in and out of combat.
• Lists of creatures sorted by both type and level, making it
easy to find the alien you need when you need it.
Blast off into Starfinder Second Edition with a star chart of the galaxy and a thrilling tour of
adventuring locations across the vastness of interstellar space! The Starfinder Galaxy Guide is a primer
designed for new and experienced players that explores popular types of science fantasy campaigns—
galactic exploration, horror, war-torn space opera, and more—giving GMs and players tools for playing
out those types of stories in their Starfinder game. The Galaxy Guide also introduces several powerful
galactic factions as potential friends or foes, including AbadarCorp’s holy corporate empire, the
infernal orders of the Hellknights, and the world-preserving Xenowardens. Each major faction includes
a new archetype players can use to create a character with ties to that faction. The galactic tour ends
with a database of playable alien ancestries, including a telepathic mega-brain with an atrophied
body (contemplative), a friendly shapeshifter with a secretly bizarre true form (astrazoan), and more!

text.b: Starfinder Galaxy Guide Hobby Retailer Edition

page.text: • A double-sided map featuring the Starfinder galaxy
• Six new playable alien ancestries: astrazoan,
contemplative, dragonkin, kalo, sarcesian, and vlaka.
• Six new archetypes related to powerful galactic
• Exciting new lore introducing new gods, current
events, and important hotspots in the Starfinder
This 224-page rulebook is packed full of playable alien ancestries for Starfinder Second
Edition games, including 21 brand new options like the lucky blue worlanisi, sentient
rollerball bantrid, or even a blazing miniature sun called a novian. In addition to this
intergalactic cast of science-fantasy species are a host of stellar options for familiar
ancestries, including Starfinder favorites like reptilian vesk and insectoid shirrens, and
fantasy classics like gnomes, elves, and goblins
in space! On top of that, the brand-new Gap-
touched versatile heritage connects players to
the history-breaking event at the heart of the
Starfinder setting while giving them special
abilities, and the xenometric android allows
readers to create robotic versions of any
As with all Starfinder Second Edition
Edition, allowing players and Game Masters
to incorporate interstellar options into their
alien character are you going to play first?
Absalom Station is a famous port of call at the center of the galaxy. It’s a place where
worlds and cultures collide, and where danger and opportunity lurk around every corner.
This 164-page hardcover rulebook presents new player options, GM tools, and lore for
creating Starfinder adventures on Absalom Station or anywhere in the galaxy!
• An astounding array of foes and friends likely to show up on a space station.
• Campaign-ready information about culture, lodging, and travel on Absalom Station, including new
lore about the station’s infamous districts and neighborhoods.
• Four new archetypes for the Aspis Consortium, Ghost Couriers, Eyeswide Agency, and Stewards
• Two new playable species: The mysterious bovine humanoids called nuar, and the aberrant
Tech Core has everything you need to upgrade your Starfinder game! This 264-page
rulebook introduces two tech-savvy classes, the artificially enhanced mechanic and the
magic-hacking technomancer. It also features tactical starship combat, with new rules
for building, crewing, and upgrading starships, plus hordes of sample foes, hazards, and
plenty of GM tools for running your own tactical space battle.
• New archetypes including the nanite-controlling nanocyte and resourceful junkomancer.
• New high-tech ancestries and versatile heritages, including robotic SROs, living holograms and
• Rules for building and controlling your own tech companions!
• New feats designed to interact with technology!
• An arsenal of new gear including armor, weapons, upgrades, and augmentations—even magic
Maintain the flow of combat with
that stick right to it. List the names of
heroes and foes on the magnets using
a wet- or dry-erase marker, then place
them in initiative order. Easily track
when a character delays their turn or
starts dying by sliding the magnets.
Take the uncertainty out of battle with
• 1 double-sided magnetic wet- and dry-erase board, with areas to write initiative numbers, track
• 2 sheets of magnets, including: 34 red enemy magnets, 18 blue player character magnets, 14
green nonplayer character magnets, 4 gray hazard magnets, 8 arrows in different colors for
tracking turns and durations, and 4 condition magnets in different colors.
Keep critical character details at your
room for everything you need to know

text.b: This sturdy folio’s 8 character-defining pages include:

page.text: • Expanded space for your character’s ability scores, feats, and class features.
• A diagram to help fill every item slot, including augmentations!
• Room to chronicle your character’s achievements, goals, and history.
• Quick reference charts to character advancement.
• Tons of space to track gear.
• Folder-flaps to hold handouts and other documents.
Launch your game into overdrive with
the Starfinder GM Screen. This sturdy
stunning battle scene by legendary artist
Ben Wootten on one side and handy charts
and game tables on the other side to give
a busy GM everything they need to run
a Starfinder game! Whether you need to
quickly reference a rule or simply keep
your star charts and other plans secured
from players’ scanning eyes, the Starfinder
by 8.5”, giving you plenty of space to hide
your notes, dice rolls, and secret plans.
Printed on sturdy cardstock, each of the hundreds of double-sided creature tokens
included in this collection contains a beautiful full-color image of an alien enemy or ally
from Starfinder Alien Core. The tokens fit perfectly on Starfinder and Pathfinder Flip-Mats
These 108 cards include rules for the Starfinder Second Edition conditions, with
prominent reminder text you can read at a glance. Multiple copies of the most crucial
conditions mean there are enough for the whole table, and a set of tracking cards lets you
easily monitor condition values and durations!
Tired of plain old double damage? After you score a critical hit, draw a card and apply one
of three different effects based on attack type. These cards are designed to work with
Starfinder Second Edition and can be used by players and GMs alike.
When you roll a 1 on an attack, simply draw a card and apply one of three different effects
based on attack type. These cards are designed to work with Starfinder Second Edition
and can be used by players and GMs alike. Failing miserably has never been more fun!
The first Adventure Path of Starfinder Second Edition!
While working for a dwarven mining collective on a
mysterious asteroid, a group of adventurers discover
an ancient secret that puts them at odds with the
dreaded undead space armada known as the Corpse
Fleet! Can the heroes survive the trials that await
them on the grave world and beyond, or will they
be the first victims of the Corpse Fleet’s ambitions
of turning the galaxy into a cosmic graveyard? This
levels 1 to 5, with roughly one level of epic adventure
in each of its five parts. Written by Michael Bramnik.

text.b: Guilt of the Grave World Adventure Path
Guilt of the Grave World Special Edition
SECRETS OF THE SWARM ADVENTURE PATH

page.text: The Szandite Collective is a peaceful federation of worlds connected by magical crystals.
When planet Krethiskar fell silent, the galaxy’s worst fears came true. The destructive
Swarm had annihilated Krethiskar’s defenses and transformed the world into an
incubator for future generations of hive-mind-controlled shock troops. This time, the
Swarm isn’t simply annihilating everything in their path—they might just be converting
their conquests into terrifying new weapons!
This 144-page hardcover adventure includes a complete Starfinder campaign for character
levels 6–10. The book also includes a stellar rules appendix that offers new playable ancestries,
magic items, and monsters designed to deploy into your Starfinder game!

text.b: Secrets of the Swarm Adventure Path (September)
Secrets of the Swarm Special Edition (September)

page.text: Explore a pristine planet in a magically warped sector!
Survive a haunted supply depot in deep space! Infiltrate
a vault inside a false moon occupied by a uniquely
out-of-touch community! Fight back against an imperial
invasion on a distant world! This 128-page hardback
features four adventures taking place in the most
unpredictable part of the galaxy where anything can
happen! Tales from the Vast is designed to be played
back-to-back as a campaign from 1st through 9th level, or
each adventure can be played separately as a one-shot.

text.b: Tales from the Vast Adventure Anthology (May)
Tales from the Vast Special Edition (May)

page.text: The first deluxe adventure for Starfinder Second Edition is here! A strange message invites six
strangers to Striving, an expansive megaplex city on Aballon, the planet of machines. There, they
gather in a neon-lit establishment, surrounded by androids and robots, to meet an old friend—who
just so happens to have recently been murdered. This grim discovery unites the strangers into a
crew of unlikely investigators! If they want to find the killer, they’ll need to outrun murderous
robots, outwit clever foes, and analyze perplexing clues—all while wondering whether they’re
hunting the murderer or the murderer is hunting them. Murder in Metal City is a premium boxed-set
adventure for Starfinder Second Edition. It includes six pregenerated 1st-level characters and
everything else the players and GM need to run the adventure, from tokens and battle maps to
special handouts, item cards, enemy statistics, and more.

text.b: Starfinder Murder in Metal City Deluxe Adventure

page.text: • Six new pregenerated characters with player
handouts, one for each class from Starfinder Player
• A double-sided combat map featuring key locations
• Articles about the machine planet Aballon and the
megaplex city of Striving, plus a double-sided poster
• One new playable alien ancestry: khizars, the plant-
like protectors of Aballon’s jungle-filled Ice Wells.
• An article detailing the tech faiths of the Starfinder
universe, from deities like Triune and Lambatuin to
the unique philosophies of the robotic anacites.

text.b: ASSAULT ON ABSALOM STATION—A STARFINDER NOVEL

page.text: Seven years after the galaxy awoke from a period of collective amnesia known as the
Gap, the citizens of Absalom Station have established a new normalcy living at the hub of
recently discovered interstellar Drift travel. But all is not well for the founding members
of the Starfinder Society, as tensions between the living and undead inhabitants of
the station come to a violent head. Now, the undead starships of the Corpse Fleet and
invading troops from the dead world of Eox besiege the station, threatening everything
survive the chaos of the Magefire
Absalom Station or will this be the
end of their Society and home?
Chk and Dae discover as they pry
author Tim Pratt comes a sequel to
Era of the Eclipse, detailing another
key moment in the history of the
not all of the Starfinder Society’s

text.b: ERA OF THE ECLIPSE—A STARFINDER NOVEL

page.text: Everything has a beginning, even the death of history. When two novice Starfinders, the
energetic Dae and somber Chk Chk, make a startling discovery, they unlock a link to one
of the galaxy’s most momentous events: the Gap and the disappearance of the now-lost
world of Golarion. Shrouded in mystery, the Gap ended with mortals across the cosmos
suddenly finding themselves with memories stripped from their minds without warning or
explanation. The android Tyrcell wakes up on Absalom Station, the core of the Starfinder
setting, on the day after the Gap. With their memories wiped, they contend with chaos on
the station while surviving and building a coalition of memory-addled allies. All the while,
other forces begin to wake after the cosmic event and enact plans of their own. From the
undead media mogul, Zo!, who seeks to capitalize on the event, to the fiendish servants
known as Hellknights, there’s no shortage of opportunists as the galaxy reels! Both stories
collide as the Starfinder agents and Tyrcell, separated by centuries, uncover a gift left to
mortals by Yaraesa, goddess of knowledge and science. This secret could unravel the truth
of the Gap, but in the days following the event,
the nascent Hellknight Order of the Eclipse will
stop at nothing to control exactly what that
message is. Meanwhile, in the modern age, a
mysterious figure trails the Starfinders as they

(City of the Fallen Sky, Reign of Stars, Liar’s
Blade) comes the definitive starting point to the
award-winning, science fantasy setting of the

iconic characters as they rush to uncover the
